title: Implement .taskulus dotfile inclusion
description: Read .taskulus list of paths (relative to dotfile) to include additional project directories.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented .taskulus dotfile inclusion for project discovery in Python and Rust, with validation of referenced paths. Added tests for dotfile discovery in both implementations. Tests: python -m pytest --cov=taskulus --cov-report=term-missing python/tests; cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml --tests
